# destinationEntityName

**Instance Property**

The destination entity name for the entity mapping.

## Declaration

```swift
var destinationEntityName: String? { get set }
```

## Discussion

Mappings are not directly bound to entity descriptions. You can use the migration manager’s [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSMigrationManager/destinationEntity(for:)] method to retrieve the entity description for this entity name.

## Related Documentation

- **sourceEntityName**: The source entity name for the entity mapping.

## Managing Destination Information

- **destinationEntityVersionHash**: The version hash for the destination entity for the entity mapping.
